title: dicksonia lanata
intro: Dicksonia lanata, also known as the woolly tree fern, is a species of tree fern native to New Zealand. It is a perennial plant that belongs to the family Dicksoniaceae and is characterized by its tall, slender trunk and large, pinnately divided fronds. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to the presence of saponins and other compounds. The health benefits of Dicksonia lanata include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting digestive health, and it can be prepared as a tea or infusion, as well as being used in tincture form.
